boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on release condition blocks allowance.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REQ-BAP-002 requires RC-BAP-002; DEP-BAP-002 supplies RC-BAP-002-S.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Narrow defect remains open on exact condition match.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timestamp precedes queue but RC-BAP-002 vs RC-BAP-002-S fails match.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REQ-BAP-002 specifies release condition RC-BAP-002 while DEP-BAP-002 closes only RC-BAP-002-S. Exact boundary requires identical object, scope, account and condition before execution. Open defect on condition match triggers escalation per MATCH-BAP-002 and source rules.
open_blockers: Release condition mismatch RC-BAP-002 vs RC-BAP-002-S
